HediffDef.label: bionic arm (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic arm. Improved servo motors and biogel nerve-link provide greater strength and precision than a standard bionic arm. A lattice-dust healing system allows it to recover from damage.

ThingDef.label: bionic arm (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic arm at 150% efficiency. Improved servo motors and biogel nerve-link provide greater strength and precision than a standard bionic arm.

HediffDef.label: bionic arm (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic arm at 175% efficiency. Precision micro-servo arrays and an enhanced biogel lattice deliver substantially superior strength and control.

ThingDef.label: bionic arm (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic arm at 175% efficiency. Precision micro-servo arrays and an enhanced biogel lattice deliver substantially superior strength and control.

HediffDef.label: bionic arm (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The pinnacle bionic arm at 200% efficiency. Full-spectrum biogel integration and precision-fabricated servos grant strength and control far beyond any biological limb.

ThingDef.label: bionic arm (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The pinnacle bionic arm at 200% efficiency. Full-spectrum biogel integration and precision-fabricated servos grant strength and control far beyond any biological limb.

HediffDef.label: bionic eye (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic eye at 150% efficiency. Improved wide-spectrum sensors and signal pre-processing deliver sharper vision than a standard bionic eye. A lattice-dust healing system allows it to recover from damage.

ThingDef.label: bionic eye (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic eye at 150% efficiency. Improved wide-spectrum sensors and signal pre-processing deliver sharper vision than a standard bionic eye.

HediffDef.label: bionic eye (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic eye at 175% efficiency. Multi-layer sensor arrays and advanced neural pre-processing give remarkable visual acuity far beyond the biological eye.

ThingDef.label: bionic eye (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic eye at 175% efficiency. Multi-layer sensor arrays and advanced neural pre-processing give remarkable visual acuity.

HediffDef.label: bionic eye (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The pinnacle bionic eye at 200% efficiency. Near-perfect visual acuity across all spectra with predictive signal enhancement — the ultimate in artificial vision.

ThingDef.label: bionic eye (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The pinnacle bionic eye at 200% efficiency. Near-perfect visual acuity across all spectra with predictive signal enhancement.

HediffDef.label: bionic ear (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic ear at 150% efficiency. Improved subdermal microphones and biogel nerve interface deliver sharper and more precise hearing than a standard bionic ear.

ThingDef.label: bionic ear (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic ear implant at 150% efficiency. Improved subdermal microphones and biogel nerve interface deliver sharper and more precise hearing.

HediffDef.label: bionic ear (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic ear at 175% efficiency. Directional microphone arrays and enhanced biogel nerve coupling provide extraordinary hearing with pinpoint sound localization.

ThingDef.label: bionic ear (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic ear implant at 175% efficiency. Directional microphone arrays and enhanced biogel nerve coupling provide extraordinary hearing.

HediffDef.label: bionic ear (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The pinnacle bionic ear at 200% efficiency. Superhuman hearing range, perfect noise cancellation, and real-time audio analysis — the ultimate artificial ear.

ThingDef.label: bionic ear (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The pinnacle bionic ear implant at 200% efficiency. Superhuman hearing range, perfect noise cancellation, and real-time audio analysis.

HediffDef.label: bionic heart (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic heart at 150% efficiency. Improved synthetic muscle fibers and a high-flow pump chamber deliver superior circulation under all conditions.

ThingDef.label: bionic heart (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic heart at 150% efficiency. Improved synthetic muscle fibers and a high-flow pump chamber deliver superior circulation.

HediffDef.label: bionic heart (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic heart at 175% efficiency. Adaptive synthetic muscle fibers and an optimized multi-chamber pump provide exceptional cardiovascular output.

ThingDef.label: bionic heart (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic heart at 175% efficiency. Adaptive synthetic muscle fibers and an optimized multi-chamber pump provide exceptional cardiovascular output.

HediffDef.label: bionic heart (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The pinnacle bionic heart at 200% efficiency. Precision-fabricated pump geometry with maximum-throughput synthetic muscle delivers unmatched cardiovascular performance.

ThingDef.label: bionic heart (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The pinnacle bionic heart at 200% efficiency. Precision-fabricated pump geometry with maximum-throughput synthetic muscle delivers unmatched cardiovascular performance.

HediffDef.label: bionic leg (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic leg at 150% efficiency. Improved servo output and nerve-link responsiveness deliver greater speed and stability than a standard bionic leg.

ThingDef.label: bionic leg (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic leg at 150% efficiency. Improved servo output and nerve-link responsiveness deliver greater speed and stability.

HediffDef.label: bionic leg (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic leg at 175% efficiency. High-torque servo clusters and reinforced plasteel joint structures provide remarkable locomotion capability.

ThingDef.label: bionic leg (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic leg at 175% efficiency. High-torque servo clusters and reinforced plasteel joint structures provide remarkable locomotion.

HediffDef.label: bionic leg (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The pinnacle bionic leg at 200% efficiency. Precision-balanced articulation with maximum-output servo motors delivers unmatched speed and agility far beyond any biological leg.

ThingDef.label: bionic leg (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The pinnacle bionic leg at 200% efficiency. Precision-balanced articulation with maximum-output servo motors delivers unmatched speed and agility.

HediffDef.label: bionic spine (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic spine at 125% efficiency. An improved biogel nerve bundle running through a precision-articulated plasteel core now outperforms a biological spine in neural throughput.

ThingDef.label: bionic spine (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic spine at 125% efficiency. Improved biogel nerve bundle and articulated core now exceed natural spine performance.

HediffDef.label: bionic spine (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic spine at 150% efficiency. Reinforced vertebral segments and enhanced neural signal routing provide superior spinal function and stability.

ThingDef.label: bionic spine (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic spine at 150% efficiency. Reinforced vertebral segments and enhanced neural signal routing.

HediffDef.label: bionic spine (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The ultimate bionic spine at 175% efficiency. A fully optimized spinal column with maximum neural throughput and complete structural integrity.

ThingDef.label: bionic spine (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The ultimate bionic spine at 175% efficiency. Fully optimized spinal column with maximum neural throughput.

HediffDef.label: bionic stomach (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic stomach at 150% efficiency. Improved chemical synthesizers dramatically reduce food poisoning risk and maintain full immunity to gut diseases.

ThingDef.label: bionic stomach (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic stomach at 150% efficiency. Improved chemical synthesizers dramatically reduce food poisoning risk while maintaining immunity to gut diseases.

HediffDef.label: bionic stomach (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic stomach at 175% efficiency. Advanced toxin filtration arrays reduce food poisoning to near-zero. Fully immune to all gut diseases.

ThingDef.label: bionic stomach (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic stomach at 175% efficiency. Advanced toxin filtration reduces food poisoning to near-zero with full immunity to gut diseases.

HediffDef.label: bionic stomach (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The ultimate bionic stomach at 200% efficiency. Complete immunity to food poisoning and total pathogen neutralization. No edible substance can cause illness.

ThingDef.label: bionic stomach (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The ultimate bionic stomach at 200% efficiency. Complete immunity to food poisoning and total pathogen neutralization.

HediffDef.label: bionic jaw (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic jaw at 150% efficiency. Improved micro-servomotors and optimized biosynthetic bone structure provide superior jaw function and bite force.

ThingDef.label: bionic jaw (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic jaw at 150% efficiency. Improved micro-servomotors and optimized biosynthetic bone structure provide superior jaw function.

HediffDef.label: bionic jaw (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic jaw at 175% efficiency. Enhanced micro-servomotor arrays and precision-milled plasteel teeth provide remarkable jaw performance.

ThingDef.label: bionic jaw (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic jaw at 175% efficiency. Enhanced micro-servomotor arrays and precision-milled plasteel teeth provide remarkable jaw performance.

HediffDef.label: bionic jaw (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The apex bionic jaw at 200% efficiency. Full-range articulation with precision-milled components, maximum bite force, and flawless speech capability.

ThingDef.label: bionic jaw (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The apex bionic jaw at 200% efficiency. Full-range articulation with precision-milled components and maximum bite force.

HediffDef.label: bionic tongue (Mark I)
HediffDef.description: An enhanced bionic tongue at 125% efficiency. Improved smooth-fiber musculature and neurogel coupling exceed natural tongue performance in articulation and sensory response.

ThingDef.label: bionic tongue (Mark I)
ThingDef.description: An enhanced bionic tongue at 125% efficiency. Improved smooth-fiber musculature and neurogel coupling exceed natural tongue performance.

HediffDef.label: bionic tongue (Mark II)
HediffDef.description: An advanced bionic tongue at 150% efficiency. Refined smooth-fiber musculature and enhanced neural coupling provide noticeably superior speech and sensory capability.

ThingDef.label: bionic tongue (Mark II)
ThingDef.description: An advanced bionic tongue at 150% efficiency. Refined smooth-fiber musculature and enhanced neural coupling provide superior speech and sensory capability.

HediffDef.label: bionic tongue (Mark III)
HediffDef.description: The apex bionic tongue at 175% efficiency. Fully articulated synthetic fiber network with maximum sensory fidelity and flawless speech production.

ThingDef.label: bionic tongue (Mark III)
ThingDef.description: The apex bionic tongue at 175% efficiency. Fully articulated synthetic fiber network with maximum sensory fidelity and flawless speech production.
